label: 第174話
source_locator: 単行本20巻 目次 p.47
summary_short: 仙台結界では乙骨がドルゥヴ・ラクダワラを倒し、市民を守りながら膠着状態を崩す。四つ巴の一角だった黒沐死が活動を始める。
summary_full: 仙台結界ではドゥルヴ、黒沐死、烏鷺亨子、石流龍の四者が互いを牽制していたが、乙骨憂太がドゥルヴを倒して均衡を崩す。乙骨は五条に二度も親友を殺させないため、自分だけで羂索を倒し、必要な総則を追加する400点を得ると決意する。乙骨が競技場の一般人を安全な場所へ導こうとする中、ドゥルヴを天敵として休眠していた特級呪霊・黒沐死が活動を開始し、無数の蜚蠊を市民へ向かわせる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 乙骨憂太 has excelled thus far in the 死滅回游 , impressing all those observing him. By cutting down ドゥルヴ Lakdawalla to ensure the safety of a group of civilians, 憂太 has also gained the attention of a disturbing new threat.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: "黒沐死 will make its move!" 烏鷺亨子 and 石流龍 observe the situation in the 仙台結界 . ドゥルヴ Lakdawalla has fallen and his patrolling 式神 are disappearing. 龍 uses his コガネ to check who defeated ドゥルヴ and discovers the player is 乙骨憂太. Takako does the same and while she's glad the ugly 式神 are disappearing, she's concerned about a new threat that will emerge. 龍 realizes he was only able to get close to ドゥルヴ without provoking him because he was occupied with 憂太. Takako and 龍 both know that following ドゥルヴ's defeat, 黒沐死 will surely emerge next. While the latter thinks things are getting interesting, the former gets frustrated by the prospect. After cutting down ドゥルヴ, 憂太 regroups with the group of civilians he's been protecting. He tells them it's time to head North to the edge of the barrier but notices a mother and daughter struggling to go on. 憂太 changes his mind and tells all the civilians they can rest inside the stadium that was serving as ドゥルヴ's base instead. He's sure it will be safe inside but he's suddenly interrupted by a loud buzzing sound that indicates danger. 憂太 orders everyone to hurry inside the stadium as he looks out and sees a giant swarm of bugs chasing people. It's already laid claim to two other people but 憂太 is confident he can save the man running out in front of the swarm. 憂太 tries to rescue a civilian from a swarm of cursed cockroaches. 憂太 grabs the man's arm and jumps above the swarm, but he's unable to create enough space and the cockroaches devour the civilian's lower body before quickly stripping off all his flesh. 憂太 blocks the cockroaches from attacking him next and notices that all of them are real insects reinforced with 呪力 . The swarm tries to move on from 憂太 to attack the other civilians but he summons 里香 to stop them. 里香 smashes a bridge with a single blow and collapses the structure on top of the swarm, forcing it to go back toward 憂太. The special grade sorcerer imbues his katana with 呪力 and swings it with enough force to create a large blastwave that annihilates the whole swarm in one shot. 憂太 resolves to kill 羂索 and score four hundred points on his own. Watching the action, 龍 comments that while 憂太's 呪力 output isn't anything special, his overall 呪力 is very impressive. Meanwhile, Takako looks on and simply comments to herself that 黒沐死's cockroaches are disgusting. 黒沐死 is a special grade cockroach curse who was a poor matchup for ドゥルヴ, so it went into a dormant state until he was eliminated. The curse has an endless appetite and eating stimulates its ability to perform parthenogenesis. Now awakened, the cockroach curse is starving and its instincts lead it to devour 憂太. Confronted by this new threat, 憂太 asks his コガネ if this 呪霊 is a player, which the 式神 confirms. ドゥルヴ would've been a poor matchup for 黒沐死, so it went into a dormant state until he was eliminated. 黒沐死 has an endless appetite and eating stimulates its parthenogenesis. Having just awakened, 黒沐死 is starving and now its instincts are leading it to devour 憂太. "The Festing Life Sword, an enchanted blade that mixes life and death." While preparing to face off against 黒沐死, 憂太 ponders his objective in this colony. He knows resources are finite and it's only a matter of time before a rule allowing passage in and out of colonies is added. However, dangerous players like ドゥルヴ can't be allowed to leave the barrier. With the likelihood that there are other players like him, 憂太 knows that communication between colonies is necessary to prevent anyone dangerous from leaving them. In addition to the rules 恵 proposed in the meeting with 天元 , 憂太 understands his allies need a means of communication and a way to move in and out of the colonies. That's a total of four rules for their group to get a handle on the 死滅回游. 憂太 feels that the 渋谷事変 exhausted all his allies and he doesn't want to make his sensei kill his best friend again. Poised and ready to engage the enemy player with his katana, 憂太 resolves to kill 羂索 and obtain four hundred points all on his own. In response to 憂太's battle stance, 黒沐死 reveals a cursed tool called the 爛生刀 , an enchanted blade that mixes life and death.

key_events_verified_phase9: 乙骨がドゥルヴを倒して四つ巴を崩す
乙骨が400点獲得と羂索討伐を決意する
乙骨が一般人を避難させる
黒沐死が活動を開始する
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
